body:
Parent issue: #126

Stage: sepo-setup-issue-template

## Task

Implement the next small staged child under #126: add a structured Sepo setup issue template. Create `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/sepo-setup.yml` so users can express repo setup intent in a human-editable form, including agent handle defaulting to `@sepo-agent`, assign-to-agent behavior, project management mode (`off`, `dry-run`, `project-backed` or equivalent), create/link GitHub Project choice, Project owner/title, default statuses `Inbox`, `In Progress`, `To Review`, `Done`, priority field choice, effort field choice, and optional release field choice. The template should guide users to request `/setup plan` first and make clear that `/setup apply` requires explicit confirmation later. Update focused docs if needed so the template fits the experimental Project-backed planning flow. Do not implement the `/setup` route, repo variable mutation, GitHub Project creation/linking, Project field sync, or project-manager apply behavior in this child. Preserve behavior from stacked PRs #134, #136, #141, and #143, and add focused validation/tests if the repo has existing issue-template or YAML coverage.

## Base

- base_pr: #143

<!-- sepo-sub-orchestrator parent:126 stage:sepo-setup-issue-template state:done parent_round:4 -->
